svg.text: JSON ingest → embedded chunks → grain-shifting retrieval → fit-aware drafts

g.text: decode län/kommun · find website (search) · scrape page
writes back to stiftelser; per-field confidence column

svg.text: generation · runs 3× (once per foundation in top-3)

g.text: stateless & idempotent — no run-to-run state, no change detection on re-scrape.
Future: enricher pipeline populates målgrupp/geo/app-form/deadline; method routing then becomes possible.
Demo narrative · Stadsmissionen programme (e.g. Hemlöshet) → 3 best-fit stiftelser → for each: honest fit + gaps + tailored draft. "When NOT to apply" is the pitch.
the "group by stiftelse_id" node changes grain from chunks → foundations.
K chunks may collapse to fewer than K foundations; LLM re-rank then judges full profiles, not fragments.
